chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-5304 of 2023 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.24382/2023 2.For hearing of main case. 20.02.2025 Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Muhammad Taseer Khan, Advocate for the Respondent (F.B.R) Per learned counsel finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition. He seeks that the Department may be directed to finalize the assessment after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action shall be taken against the petitioner. Learned counsel for the Respondent (F.B.R) has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
